content: Phyllis: Her hands wrap around her bent knees as her body shudders. What kind of nightmare brought me back tonight? Piper: Heyy there sleepyhead... Are you all right? Dreams can get pretty wild after you've been awake all day. Might just be time for a stress relief session instead of tossing and turning the night away, know what I mean? I got some amazing new techniques and toys I learned while in Diamond City. Been working as a pornographic reporter you know, covering... 'special events'.  Ever had a nice little fisting session, doll? It could help clear those muddied dreams right out. Phyllis: Leave me alone, please...

Phyllis: Leave me alone, please... I need to be alone. My mind is filled with terrible memories, and I can't handle any more... Piper: Alright, just remember that you're not alone here. We're all in this together, even if we don't always understand each other. Maybe you should come with us for a while. MJR and I could use some company, and you could use some friends. Plus, we have some pretty great stress relief techniques to share. Just think about it, okay? Phyllis: I... I don't know if I'm ready for that. But... thank you. Thank you for understanding. Piper: Anytime, doll. Just remember that we're here for you. Now, if you need anything, don't hesitate to ask. We're not going anywhere. Phyllis: Thank you. I appreciate that. Goodnight... Piper: Sweet dreams, Phyllis. And if those nightmares come back, just remember: we're here for you.
